commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves Control UI approval prompt resolution into a controller, treats stale resolve errors as cleanup signals, adds neutral dismiss/reopen UI, and expands approval controller, view, and gateway tests.

PR surface: Source +265, Tests +403. Total +668 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The current-main source shows stale resolve errors become modal errors and cancel/Escape sends deny, while the gateway error/list contracts provide a clear source-level reproduction path without running the UI here.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can prune expired refreshed approvals and add focused regression coverage, while maintainer review still owns the Dismiss/Escape UX choice.

target.title: Fix stale approval prompts in Control UI
target.body:
Summary:
- Harden Control UI approval prompts when the UI acts on an approval that has already been resolved elsewhere or no longer exists.
- Treat stale resolve responses as terminal UI cleanup signals: `APPROVAL_ALREADY_RESOLVED`, `APPROVAL_NOT_FOUND`, and `unknown or expired approval id` now dismiss the prompt and refresh pending approvals.
- Add a neutral Dismiss/close path that hides the modal without denying or approving the backend approval, plus a visible pending-approval reopen button so live approvals are not stranded.

Bug summary:
Current main already removes a web approval modal when a connected Control UI receives `exec.approval.resolved` or `plugin.approval.resolved`. The broken path is stale local UI state: if the modal remains visible because the resolved event was missed, delayed, or the user acts on an already-resolved approval, the web UI treats stale backend responses as modal errors. The old modal close path also sent `deny`, so closing a stale modal could hit the same backend error instead of being a local dismiss.

Root cause:
On main, `exec.approval.resolved` removes the queue item, but the approve/deny handler catches every resolve error as `execApprovalError`. It does not recognize backend stale-approval responses as terminal cleanup signals. The modal cancel path is also wired to denial, so there is no neutral local dismiss when the user is trapped in a stale or failing modal.

Fix summary:
The approval controller now owns resolve and modal visibility cleanup. Success removes the active prompt. Stale backend errors remove it, refresh `exec.approval.list` and `plugin.approval.list`, and schedule expiry cleanup for refreshed items. A dismissed-id set lets users close the modal locally while keeping the backend approval pending. If a live approval is dismissed, the UI renders a small pending-approval button that reopens the modal. Refresh also preserves approval events that arrive while the list RPCs are in flight so a stale snapshot cannot hide a newly delivered approval.

Main behavior checked:
- The connected happy path works on main: when Discord denies an approval and the Control UI receives `exec.approval.resolved`, the modal disappears.
- Main still has stale-action/close-path issues: `handleExecApprovalDecision` treats stale resolve errors as modal errors, and modal cancel/Escape calls `handleExecApprovalDecision("deny")` instead of a neutral dismiss.

Verification:
- Manual A-side check on unfixed `origin/main` (`1e9b6b7627`): Discord deny sent `exec.approval.resolved`, and the connected Control UI modal disappeared as expected.
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache-approval-modal node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.browser.test.ts --run` passed, 4 files / 89 tests.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ui/src/styles/components.css ui/src/ui/app-gateway-chat-load.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.sessions.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/app-view-state.ts ui/src/ui/app.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.browser.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.ts` passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo` passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-ui.tsbuildinfo` passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/styles/components.css ui/src/ui/app-gateway-chat-load.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.sessions.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/app-view-state.ts ui/src/ui/app.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.browser.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.ts` passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` passed: no accepted/actionable findings after fixing the refresh-race finding.

Behavior addressed: stale Control UI exec/plugin approval modals when local UI state outlives backend approval state, neutral modal dismissal without resolving the backend approval, a visible reopen path for dismissed live approvals, and preservation of approval events received during stale-error refresh.
Real environment tested: local Vitest, oxlint, tsgo, oxfmt, autoreview, and unfixed-main manual Discord-to-Control-UI check.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: triggered approval handling through the focused UI/controller/gateway tests listed above; on unfixed main, triggered `pwd` from Discord and denied in Discord while the Control UI was open.
Evidence after fix: focused tests passed; stale backend errors remove prompts and refresh pending approvals; view tests confirm Escape/Dismiss stay usable and dismissed live approvals can be reopened; controller tests confirm refresh does not drop approvals that arrive while the list RPCs are pending.
Observed result after fix: stale resolve success/errors remove the modal, resolved events clear active prompt errors, refreshed pending approvals expire from the UI, Dismiss/Escape close the modal without sending a deny while leaving a visible pending-approval reopen control, and concurrent live approval events survive refresh.
What was not tested: a fresh live Slack-to-Control-UI stale approval flow after the final clean branch rewrite.
